title: 6 Pack Air Fryer Silicone Magnet Clips, Heat-Resistant Buckles to Secure Parchment Liners, Prevent Paper Burning & Food Covering, Universal Fit for All Iron-Basket Models
features: 🍳 Specific Compatibility: These 6pcs Air Fryer Magnet Silicone Buckles, essential air fryer accessories, are specifically designed for air fryers with iron liners. They offer a perfect fit and reliable performance for this specific type of air fryer.

🧲 Powerful Magnet Function: These air fryer magnets provide strong magnetic force, ensuring that they firmly hold down the parchment paper or other liners in the air fryer. This prevents the paper from shifting during the cooking process.
🔥 Silicone Quality Assurance: Air fryer magnet silicone buckle is made of high-quality silicone, durable and heat-resistant. They can withstand temperatures up to 464°F.

🎁 Easy to Use: With a simple design, these air fryer accessories are extremely easy to use. Just place them on the edge of the iron liner, and the magnets will quickly attach, making the cooking preparation process a breeze.

⚡ Enhanced Cooking Experience: By using these air fryer magnets, you can ensure even heat distribution in the air fryer, as the liners stay in place. This leads to better - cooked food and a more enjoyable cooking experience.
description: 6 Pack Air Fryer Silicone Magnet Clips, Heat-Resistan Buckles to Secure Parchment Liners, Prevent Paper Burning & Food Covering, Universal Fit for All Iron-Basket Models
